<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download attachment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/account/{account}/attachment/{attachment}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches attachment file as a binary stream

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"account","in":"path","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier for the email account","example":"user123","maxLength":256,"x-convert":{"trim":true}},"description":"Unique identifier for the email account","required":true},{"name":"attachment","in":"path","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Attachment ID","example":"AAAAAQAACnAcde","maxLength":2048},"description":"Attachment ID","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/octet-stream":{"schema":{"type":"string"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
